title: (Bullish Signal) NIO, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on January 11, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that NIO's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 142 similar cases, 130 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $62.88 is above $48.45 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/08/20 - 01/11/21, the price experienced a +35% Uptrend. During the week of 01/04/21 - 01/11/21, the stock enjoyed a +17% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/3ejhnbaeyxa61.png?width=1533&format=png&auto=webp&s=a660db86ffdf6c80489abd87a209e33180f0eb97

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on December 17, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on NIO as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 29 of 33 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for NIO just turned positive on January 04, 2021. Looking at past instances where NIO's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in  14 of 16 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

Following a +15.51% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where NIO advanced for three days, in 127 of 143 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 89%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8721088-nio-inc-adr-s-nio-62-7-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-january-11-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)

comments.author: SpeedyRCM_TX
comments.body: I jumped into NIO back on 11/30. After about 45 days, I jumped about 25% end of last week and early this week. I just cashed out, but hopefully it will jump up again.
